phil-1-desc: We gather diverse ideas and wisdom of community members to lead the success of the SATOSHIMEME token.
phil-2-desc: We create added value for SATOSHI and expand the community by developing and supporting various DApps and services.
phil-3-desc: A significant portion of app operating revenue is used to purchase SATOSHI tokens, directly contributing to value appreciation.
phil-4-desc: Purchased tokens are distributed as rewards for attracting new users and using apps, making the ecosystem even stronger.
app-mining-desc: Everyday participation becomes mining. An app where you can receive SATOSHIMEME as rewards through various missions and activities.
app-wallet-desc: The fastest and safest. A dedicated mobile wallet for SATOSHI where you can intuitively manage all assets in the ecosystem.
app-faucet-desc: Easy for everyone to start. A free SATOSHIMEME distribution center for crypto beginners and new users entering the ecosystem.
app-funmovie-desc: Share laughs and earn tokens! A decentralized community app to share and evaluate fun videos like YouTube and Reels.
app-dating-desc: A safe and fun dating chat app based on the MBC network. Provides premium features by combining token economy.
app-idea-desc-1: You are the protagonist of the 6th app.
app-idea-desc-2: Leave your brilliant ideas on the community board!
ref-desc: Invite friends and grow together. Abundant rewards are distributed with different weights depending on the depth of the recommendation.
ref-step1-desc-3: for the activities of friends you directly invited.
ref-step2-desc-3: for the activities of new friends invited by your friends.
